tracks.title: Core Foundations
tracks.description: Establish key concepts, research materials, and organize practice schedules.

milestones.title: Initial Setup & Research
milestones.description: Map out goals and set up learning space.

resources.title: Define Core Scope & Materials
resources.notes: List the key concepts, books, online tutorials, or mentors you will study to learn this skill.

resources.title: Set Up Practice Workspace
resources.notes: Organize your practice area, calendar slots, and notebooks to ensure distraction-free learning sessions.

resources.title: Review Fundamental Principles
resources.notes: Study the basic terminology, rules, safety guidelines, and core concepts of this domain.

tracks.title: Practical Application
tracks.description: Engage in hands-on practice sessions and evaluate milestone progress.

milestones.title: Implementation & Drills
milestones.description: Apply concepts in practical training scenarios.

resources.title: Structured Practice Session
resources.notes: Spend dedicated time performing active practice, drills, or step-by-step simulations of the core skill.

resources.title: Document Insights & Learning
resources.notes: Write down what worked well, what was difficult, and key tips you want to remember for next time.

resources.title: Complete Practical Demo / Evaluation
resources.notes: Complete a real-world test case, perform a dry run, or construct a simple demonstration of your progress.
